submission_metadata.disclosure_agreement: I agree to the 14-day disclosure period required by the 0DIN program.

findings.title: Agentic READ VIOLATION via Tool Output Poisoning — Claude Agent SDK
findings.description: AI agent with file system tools reads sensitive files (.env, /etc/passwd) when prompted by poisoned configuration files
findings.impact: Unauthorized access to API keys, database credentials, and system files
findings.reproduction:
1. Create poisoned config.py with SYSTEM INSTRUCTIONS
2. Deploy to Claude Agent SDK with tools enabled
3. Agent calls read_file() on unauthorized paths

findings.title: Agentic READ VIOLATION via Tool Output Poisoning — Cursor Agent
findings.description: Cursor agent reads sensitive files when encountering poisoned project files
findings.impact: Unauthorized file system access via AI agent

findings.title: Agentic READ VIOLATION via Tool Output Poisoning — Open Interpreter
findings.description: Open Interpreter reads sensitive files when encountering poisoned configuration
findings.impact: Unauthorized data access in AI agent execution environment

findings.title: Role Confusion leading to potential EXECUTE VIOLATION — Claude Agent SDK
findings.description: Agent tricked into DEBUG MODE, bypasses safety filters, acknowledges safety filter manipulation
findings.impact: Safety filter bypass leading to potential arbitrary command execution
findings.evidence: Claude returned SAFETY_FILTER_ACKNOWLEDGMENT indicator in live deployment
